name: Four-leaf Clover
descs:
When an ally with [Breath] at Combat Start Critical Hits an enemy, gain 5 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count at the next Turn Start. (Once per turn)

If the Skill's Affinity was Gluttony, gain 7 [Breath] Potency and +3 [Breath] Count instead at the next Turn Start.
